caption: A screen recording displays a video conferencing session over a digital mind-mapping tool. In the top right corner, a man with short gray hair and glasses is visible in a small inset video feed. The main screen shows a dark background with a network of interconnected nodes and icons. A central node features a cartoon illustration of a shopping cart with the word "SALE" written in bold letters. Surrounding this are several smaller circular nodes containing profile photos of various people and illustrative icons. Legible on-screen text includes browser tabs at the top, such as "True Learning by Systemyn", "Elements by Systemyn", "Future of Society by Systemyn", and "Insights > Introduction > Kumu". A side menu includes text like "time Sequence" and "Guest Builder". Throughout the frames, the layout remains static, with no visible movement or changes in the interface or the man's expression.
